bridge_equation_v21.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v21 = mean(B_plastic_v20, L_persist, 1 - P_persist, D_feature_v15, 1 - G_brain_v15)
bridge_equation_v21.structure_term: B_struct_v21 = mean(B_struct_v20, S_persist, R_persist, 1 - P_persist, D_structure_v15)
bridge_equation_v21.readiness_term: R_train_v21 = mean(R_train_v20, B_plastic_v21, B_struct_v21, R_persist, D_align_v15, 1 - P_persist)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第二十一桥开始直接吸收反衰减持续性结果，检验训练规则层的回升能否继续稳定。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第二十一桥并回主核，检验持续补偿是否开始固化为更稳定的规则层回升。
